title: psacalium silphiifolium
intro: Psacalium silphiifolium, also known as Mexican silphium or Mexican silfium, is a plant species in the daisy family that resembles the silphium plant of ancient Greece. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to its sesquiterpene lactones and sesquiterpene alcohols content. The health benefits of Psacalium silphiifolium include treating fever, digestive issues, and skin irritations, as well as having potential anti-cancer and antimicrobial effects. Herbal preparations of Psacalium silphiifolium can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
